name: Multiplication Table Frequency Analysis
description: Generate a 1-10 multiplication table, save it, read it back, and find the most frequent product

tasks.name: Generate and Save Multiplication Table
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to generate a multiplication table from 1 to 10. Create a 10x10 multiplication table where each cell is the product of its row and column numbers. Then you MUST call file_write to save the table to 'multiplication_table.txt'. Format the table as rows with products separated by spaces or tabs. Output the FULL table contents that were saved.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a 10x10 table with products from 1x1=1 to 10x10=100, saved to multiplication_table.txt

tasks.name: Read Multiplication Table File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read the contents of 'multiplication_table.txt' that was created in task_001. Output the FULL file contents verbatim. Do NOT summarize as 'file was read' — downstream tasks need the actual data.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the complete multiplication table data from the file

tasks.name: Find Most Frequent Product
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to analyze the multiplication table from task_002 and find which product appears most frequently. Write Python code that: 1) Parses the table data, 2) Counts the frequency of each product value, 3) Identifies the product(s) with the highest frequency. Then you MUST call file_write to save the analysis result to 'frequency_analysis.txt'. Output format: 'Most frequent product: [value], appearing [count] times'.
tasks.success_criteria: Output states the most frequent product and its count, and the result is saved to frequency_analysis.txt
